evals.prompt: Create a settings form with fields for: full name, email address, and notification preferences (email, SMS, push as toggles). Add validation and a submit button with loading state. Use TanStack Form with Zod validation.
evals.expected_output: A named function component using FieldGroup, Field, TanStack Form (useForm + form.Field), Switch toggles, data-invalid/aria-invalid, Button isLoading via form.Subscribe, gap-* spacing, semantic colors, single quotes, 4-space indent.
expectations: Uses named function declaration (not arrow function) for the component
Uses FieldGroup and Field components for form layout instead of raw div with space-y
Uses useForm from @tanstack/react-form with Zod validators.onSubmit
Uses form.Field render prop for each field with field.state.meta for validation
Uses Switch for notification toggles (not looping Button with manual active state)
Uses data-invalid on Field and aria-invalid on controls for validation states
Uses form.Subscribe with Button isLoading={isSubmitting} for submit button
Uses gap-* instead of space-y-* or space-x-* for spacing
Uses semantic color tokens, not raw colors
Uses single quotes and 4-space indentation

evals.prompt: Create a dialog for editing a user profile. Avatar at top, input fields for name and bio, Save/Cancel buttons with icons. Wire save to a TanStack Query mutation with loading state.
evals.expected_output: A named function component with DialogTitle, Avatar+AvatarFallback, data-icon on icons, render prop (not asChild) for Base UI triggers, Button isLoading from mutation isPending, lucide-react icons.
expectations: Uses named function declaration for the component
Includes DialogTitle for accessibility (visible or sr-only)
Avatar includes AvatarFallback
Icons use data-icon attribute, no sizing classes
Uses lucide-react for icons
Uses render prop (not asChild) for DialogTrigger (Base UI)
Uses useMutation with mutationOptions factory
Button has isLoading={isPending} from mutation
Uses single quotes and proper import ordering

evals.prompt: Create a dashboard showing 4 stat cards in a grid with data from TanStack Query. Each card has title, number, percentage badge. Include Suspense loading with Skeleton fallback and Empty state for no data.
evals.expected_output: A named function component with Suspense boundary, Skeleton fallback, useSuspenseQuery, full Card composition, Badge for changes, Empty component, semantic colors, gap-* spacing.
expectations: Uses named function declaration for components
Uses Suspense boundary with Skeleton-based fallback component
Uses useSuspenseQuery (not useQuery) for data fetching
Uses queryOptions factory from services layer
Uses full Card composition (CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent)
Uses Skeleton for loading placeholders, not custom animate-pulse
Uses Badge for percentage change, not custom styled spans
Uses Empty component for no-data state
Uses semantic colors, not raw values
Uses gap-* and size-* conventions
